nasb.text: Where there is no vision, the people are unrestrained, But happy is he who keeps the law.

esv.text: Where there is no prophetic vision the people cast off restraint, but blessed is he who keeps the law.

cnv.text: 沒有啟示，人民就沒有法紀； 遵守律法的，就為有福。

ccb.text: 百姓无神谕便任意妄为， 但遵守律法的人必蒙福。

csbs.text: 没有异象时，民众就放纵； 遵守律法的，这人必蒙福！
